free_text: Measurements of the radiative neutron capture
cross-section for U-238 in the 4-460 keV energy range.
Main reference, data table is given
Experimental details , U-236 and Au-197 data
Correction were made on the neutron natural background,
on the instantaneous neutron background, on the neutron
multiple scattering in the sample and neutron
in Subent 005 according to new format.
Articles were checked, BIB information was updated.
RAW was deleted from REACTIONS in Subents 002,003.
Metallic U-238, U-235 content is less then 0.004 %,
Oxide U2-O3, depleted natural uranium, U-235 content
is less then .004 percent. Two samples were used,
Metallic uranium and uranium oxide from depleted
natural uranium. Gold sample has thicknesses
Error caused by the background subtraction
Error caused by that of the standard CS
Covariance matrix is given for the elastic and gamma
strength functions belonging to s,p,d neutrons
S0 (=1.11E-4) and SG0 (=11.3E-4) values of STF are
taken from M.N.Nikolaev et al, Neutron Data For U-238.
Analytical review, part one, Obninsk,1978 ( in Russian)
